data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests confirmed RED ✓ — test_link_unlink_events_processed_in_timestamp_order FAILED (actual order [DSO-2030, DSO-2010, DSO-2020] vs expected [DSO-2010, DSO-2020, DSO-2030]); test_link_unlink_sorted_while_non_link_events_maintain_original_order FAILED (LINK processed after CREATE despite earlier timestamp). 19 pre-existing tests still pass.
